creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
slony1 2.x is incompatible with the 1.x line, and really needs to be its own
port (sort of like how perl, RT, and such are split by major versions).
 That is, you cannot simply just upgrade the slony1 port via portupgrade or
similar tools and expect it to continue working if it changes to version
2.0.

Please repo-copy slony1 to slony1-2.0 then update with this patch.  If the
submitter agrees, give him ownership of it.
